ddls:
CREATE TABLE "landings" (
  "landing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the landing data */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the source document */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Area or region where the landings occurred */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Port where the landings were recorded */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Species of the fish landed */,
  "landings_weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish landings */,
  "economic_value" REAL /* Economic value of the fish landings */,
  "landing_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the landing */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vessel that made the landing */,
  "fisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fisher who made the landing */,
  "catch_method" TEXT /* Method used to catch the fish */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of fishing gear used */,
  "market_destination" TEXT /* Destination where the fish will be sold or processed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the landing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landings_fisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("fisher_id") REFERENCES fishers ("fisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "common_names" TEXT /* JSON array of common names for the species in different languages */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "maximum_size" REAL /* Maximum size of the species */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species */,
  "life_span" INTEGER /* Average life span of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the port manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the port manager */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the port */,
  "annual_capacity" INTEGER /* Annual capacity of the port in terms of the number of landings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* JSON array of coordinates defining the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for the area */,
  "rules_and_regulations" TEXT /* JSON array of rules and regulations governing the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the vessel owner */,
  "home_port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home port of the vessel */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vessel in tons */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_home_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fishers" (
  "fisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fisher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the fisher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the fisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the fisher */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the fisher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of fishing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fisher_id")
)
